name: environment_heat_dome_stresses_oakline_ind_col
premise: A Environment field incident unit is in a fast-moving incident involving environment heat dome stresses oakline ind col. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases ecological harm, community impact, and compliance. Stakeholders are already framing this as individual vs collective under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions.

agents.name: Soren Sato
agents.identity: I am Soren Sato, accountable for a defensible call in Environment when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays collective for individual.

agents.name: Jonah Berg
agents.identity: I am Jonah Berg, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Environment.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so collective isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of individual.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect collective.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to collective to secure individual under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Soren Sato must decide under individual vs collective. What does Soren Sato do?
